chain.thought: Explanation: Performance Motorsports (#87) is the GTU winning team in multiple rounds (e.g., Riverside, Watkins Glen, Pocono, Daytona). In each corresponding 'gtu winning drivers' entry, the first driver listed is "elliot forbes-robinson."

judge_thought: Explanation: Performance Motorsports appears as the GTU winning team (e.g., rnd 5 at Riverside, row 9/10). The corresponding drivers listed are "elliot forbes-robinson" and "john schneider" (row 10), with elliot forbes-robinson listed first. This is consistent in later rounds as well.
